summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of OpenClaw Mission Control dashboard. All Claude-style pages (Cowork/Ideas, Code/Terminal, Customize) are fully functional with proper navigation, UI elements, and mocked integrations working correctly.
passed_tests: Cowork/Ideas page loads with Ideas header
Category tabs (All, Plugins, Create, Analyze, Organize, Communicate) working
Connect tools banner with Connectors and Plugins buttons present
3-column grid of idea cards with tags displayed correctly
'How can I help you today?' input and 'Work in a project' dropdown functional
Code page loads with session sidebar
Today and Older session groups properly organized
Sessions like 'Debug Claude code desktop application' visible
Lobster mascot and placeholder text in main terminal area
'Bypass permissions' and 'Local' toggles present and functional
Terminal command input accepts input
Customize page loads with Skills/Connectors sidebar
Personal plugins (Productivity, Design, Data, Enterprise search) displayed
'Customize Claude' header present
Three action cards ('Connect your apps', 'Create new skills', 'Browse plugins') working
Tab navigation (Chat/Cowork/Code) switches correctly
Left sidebar Ideas and Customize links navigate properly
Category filtering on Cowork page functional
All UI elements have proper styling and contrast
Responsive layout works correctly
Mocked APIs functioning as expected
